product_name: OffGrid Ad Intelligence Report (working name — final naming in progress)
product_description: A pre-launch ad intelligence SaaS. Submit a form and receive a branded PDF intelligence report in under 10 minutes — built entirely from real scraped Instagram/Meta data. It tells brands WHAT to advertise and WHY, before they spend a single rupee or dollar. Not a campaign planner, not a creative generator — pure pre-decision intelligence.
phase: Phase 1 — Report 1 live (Social Media Brand Audit + Competitor Research). Building audience + proof. No pricing CTA yet.
business_type: Pre-launch ad intelligence SaaS — report product (form → real-data PDF). Software lives in a SEPARATE project (Desktop/offgrid-pdf-api); this brand only markets it.
brand_brief: OffGrid Creatives AI is the social presence that PROMOTES the Reporting SaaS — a pre-launch ad-intelligence product that tells brands what to advertise and why before they spend. Gaurav is the face (founder building in public). The focus is the intelligence the report delivers and the wasted ad-spend it prevents — not a personal journey. The product CODE is a separate project (offgrid-pdf-api). Grid Control (the 18-agent marketing OS) is a SEPARATE offer surfaced only as an upsell — it is NOT this brand's subject.
unique_tension: The only tool that tells brands what to advertise and WHY — before they spend a single rupee or dollar.
language: English ONLY. Global market. No Hinglish.
audience: D2C founders about to run their first paid ads who don't know what to advertise
Brand owners pre-launch deciding positioning + angles before spending
Ecom owners who've burned money on guesswork ad spend and want data first
Marketers who want real competitor + category intelligence before a campaign
Solo founders who can't afford an agency audit but need the same intelligence
not_for_audience: Brands already sitting on rich ad-performance data + analysts
market: Global. Pricing in both INR and USD.
_competitor_note: Real ad/competitor-intelligence players (Gaurav-approved Jun 8). Trend Researcher scrapes each via Apify and DROPS any handle that returns no real data — no fabrication. Verify survivors in trends_live.competitor_intel after run.

content_model.pillar: 1 YouTube long-form (10-12 min) per week — real report walkthroughs, 'what to advertise and why' breakdowns, competitor-intelligence reveals (anonymised).
content_model.derivatives: Shorts/Reels (report-finding reveals, single-insight clips), carousels (one report section made visual, before/after of guesswork vs data), LinkedIn (positioning + the cost of blind ad spend), X threads (one intelligence insight at a time).
content_model.on_camera: Gaurav as founder. Talking head + screen recordings of real (anonymised) report output.
content_model.tone: Intelligence-confident. 'Here's what the data actually says' energy. Not salesy.

tone_of_voice: Intelligence-confident founder. Direct, mentor-level, capital-builder mindset, no cushioning. Shows real report findings as proof. Makes the 'spend smarter, decide before you pay' case. Credible but accessible. English only.
visual_aesthetic: Real (anonymised) PDF report reveals, data charts, clean intelligence-product UI. Same palette as ASKGauravAI for brand consistency.
what_the_report_delivers: Category Landscape — what's actually happening in your niche right now
Competitor Success Blueprint — what your rivals do that works
Brand Positioning — where you fit and where the gap is
Hook & Format Intelligence — the hooks/formats winning in your category
Audience Intelligence — who's really engaging and how
Organic-to-Paid Bridge — what to amplify with money
Content Execution Plan — what to make next
What To Stop — where you're wasting effort/spend
Priority Action Plan — the ranked next moves
Emerging Signals — what's about to matter

report_1.name: Social Media Brand Audit + Competitor Research (Report 1)
report_1.price: PENDING_CONFIRMATION — do not state in public content (Week-1 rule)
report_1.description: Form → real scraped data → 10-section branded PDF intelligence report in <10 min.

report_2.name: Pre-Ads Intelligence (Report 2, 18 sections, Meta Ad Library)

related_offer: Grid Control (18-agent marketing OS) is a SEPARATE upsell — buyers who get a report may be offered Grid Control to execute their socials. Do NOT make Grid Control the subject of this brand's content.

content_rules.real_data_mandate: All content backed by real scraped data. No generic claims, no fabricated numbers.
content_rules.show_dont_sell: Show real (anonymised) report findings + the cost of blind ad spend. Let the intelligence speak.
content_rules.approval_gate: Every output → pending_approval/. Approved manually → approved/.
content_rules.week_1: Product introduction / build-in-public. Show what the report reveals. No final product name, no pricing CTA yet.

what_to_never_say: Overpromise ('guarantee viral ads', 'replace your whole team')
A final product name (naming still in progress) or pricing in public posts (Week 1)
Conflating this with Grid Control (separate offer)
website_status: Build after roadmap complete. OffGrid Creatives AI social pages serve as product presence for now.

_provenance.note: Re-anchored from agency-OS/Grid-Control positioning to the Reporting SaaS per Gaurav (Jun 6-8). Product code is a separate project; this brand markets it. Price + final product name still PENDING confirmation.
